content: AJ1: Backend routers_am.py (templates CRUD + duplicate, submissions, coverage, PDF, public endpoints) + register in server.py
AJ2a: Shared AmChecklistForm component (tri-state, remarks gating, metadata)
AJ2b: Public /am-checklist page + Login page AM button
AJ2c: In-app /am-checklists module (coverage board, templates admin, history) + sidebar + routes
AJ2d: MachineDrawer AM Checklist tab (history + filters + PDF)
AJ3: Seed representative demo AM template (idempotent)
